svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="Page-1" id="J4rOrjZ5uEIYS-cAwV19"> <mxGraphModel dx="791" dy="1091" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="850" pageHeight="1100" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <UserObject label="" plantUmlData="{
 "data": "@startuml
!theme cerulean

title <b>RAG Workflow Activity</b>

start

:Upload Contract;
:Validate File;

if (Valid?) then (Yes)
 :Extract Text;
 :Chunk Document;
 :Generate Embeddings;
 :Store in Vector DB;

 :Request Analysis;
 :Similarity Search;
 :Retrieve Chunks;

 :Generate Summary + Risk;
 :Store in MongoDB;
 :Display Result;

else (No)
 :Reject File;
endif

stop
@enduml",
 "format": "svg"
}" id="s31tFLLTC1g4qOQDU-kv-2"> <mxCell parent="1" style="shape=image;noLabel=1;verticalAlign=top;aspect=fixed;imageAspect=0;image=data:image/svg+xml,;" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="909" width="302" x="20" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </UserObject> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
